nodes.name: Miner's Initiation
nodes.description: Begin your journey into the depths. Learn the fundamentals of mining and metalwork.

nodes.name: Ore Identification
nodes.description: Learn to identify valuable ore deposits by sight and sound.

nodes.name: Metallurgy Basics
nodes.description: Master the science of working with metals. Unlocks all three specialization paths.

nodes.name: Blade Forging
nodes.description: Learn to forge sharp blades from refined metals.

nodes.name: Edge Tempering
nodes.description: Master the art of tempering blades for maximum sharpness and durability.

nodes.name: Axe Smithing
nodes.description: Forge devastating axes designed to cleave through armor.

nodes.name: Dagger Crafting
nodes.description: Craft precise daggers for quick, deadly strikes.

nodes.name: Hammer Forging
nodes.description: Create mighty hammers that crush bones and shatter shields.

nodes.name: Greataxe Mastery
nodes.description: Forge massive two-handed axes that cleave through multiple foes.

nodes.name: Legendary Weaponsmith
nodes.description: Achieve legendary status. Craft weapons spoken of in tales.

nodes.name: Efficient Mining
nodes.description: Mine faster with improved technique and tool handling.

nodes.name: Deep Vein Sensing
nodes.description: Sense hidden ore veins deep within the rock.

nodes.name: Master Smelting
nodes.description: Smelt ores with minimal waste and maximum purity.

nodes.name: Gem Extraction
nodes.description: Extract gems from ore without damaging their structure.

nodes.name: Relic Detection
nodes.description: Sense ancient relics buried in the earth.

nodes.name: Mythril Prospecting
nodes.description: Locate and extract the legendary mythril ore.

nodes.name: Divine Ore Mastery
nodes.description: Master the extraction of divine ores from the planet's core.

nodes.name: Plate Shaping
nodes.description: Shape metal plates into protective armor pieces.

nodes.name: Reinforced Plating
nodes.description: Add reinforced layers for extra protection.

nodes.name: Shield Crafting
nodes.description: Forge mighty shields that can block devastating blows.

nodes.name: Berserker Smithing
nodes.description: Craft armor that enhances offensive capabilities.

nodes.name: Elemental Resistance
nodes.description: Imbue armor with elemental resistances.

nodes.name: Masterwork Plate
nodes.description: Craft masterwork quality plate armor with exceptional stats.

nodes.name: Divine Armorsmith
nodes.description: Forge armor blessed by the gods themselves.

nodes.name: Weapon Sockets
nodes.description: Add gem sockets to weapons during forging.

nodes.name: Armor Sockets
nodes.description: Add gem sockets to armor pieces during crafting.

nodes.name: Ore Efficiency
nodes.description: Use less ore when crafting without sacrificing quality.

nodes.name: Astral Nexus
nodes.description: The center of all mystical power. Begin your journey into the arcane arts.

nodes.name: Mana Weaving
nodes.description: Learn to weave raw mana into stable patterns for crafting.

nodes.name: Arcane Attunement
nodes.description: Attune yourself to the cosmic energies. Unlocks all 5 constellation paths.

nodes.name: Rune Inscription
nodes.description: Inscribe basic runes onto equipment to grant minor bonuses.

nodes.name: Glyph Mastery
nodes.description: Master complex glyphs that provide powerful stat increases.

nodes.name: Elemental Infusion
nodes.description: Infuse weapons with elemental damage types.

nodes.name: Soul Binding
nodes.description: Bind souls to items, granting them sentience and power.

nodes.name: Arcane Overcharge
nodes.description: Push enchantments beyond normal limits. Risk of failure but massive power.

nodes.name: Cosmic Inscription
nodes.description: Write enchantments using the language of the cosmos itself.

nodes.name: Scroll Scribing
nodes.description: Learn to scribe spells onto scrolls for single-use casting.

nodes.name: Spell Page Crafting
nodes.description: Create spell pages that teach permanent spell upgrades.

nodes.name: Arcane Lexicon
nodes.description: Compile spell pages into powerful lexicons of knowledge.

nodes.name: Grimoire Binding
nodes.description: Bind multiple spell pages into grimoires of immense power.

nodes.name: Tome of Mastery
nodes.description: Create master tomes that grant entire spell schools.

nodes.name: Codex of Infinity
nodes.description: The ultimate spellcraft. Create codexes with limitless spell potential.

nodes.name: Staff Shaping
nodes.description: Shape magical wood into conduits for arcane energy.

nodes.name: Crystal Focus
nodes.description: Embed crystals into staves to focus and amplify magical power.

nodes.name: Elemental Core
nodes.description: Craft elemental cores that define a staff's magical affinity.

nodes.name: Void Channeling
nodes.description: Channel void energy through staves for devastating attacks.

nodes.name: Archmage Crafting
nodes.description: Craft staves worthy of archmages with multiple elemental affinities.

nodes.name: Staff of the Grudge
nodes.description: The legendary Staff of the Grudge. Ultimate mystical weapon.

nodes.name: Gem Cutting
nodes.description: Cut raw gems into shapes that can hold magical energy.

nodes.name: Gem Faceting
nodes.description: Create precise facets that maximize a gem's magical potential.

nodes.name: Necklace Smithing
nodes.description: Craft magical necklaces that channel gem powers directly.

nodes.name: Soul Gem Crafting
nodes.description: Infuse gems with captured souls for incredible power.

nodes.name: Astral Jewelry
nodes.description: Create jewelry that connects the wearer to astral planes.

nodes.name: Divine Gems
nodes.description: Cut gems blessed by the gods themselves.

nodes.name: Heart of the Cosmos
nodes.description: Create the legendary Heart of the Cosmos necklace.

nodes.name: Fabric Weaving
nodes.description: Weave magical threads into protective fabrics.

nodes.name: Enchanted Threads
nodes.description: Spin threads infused with raw magical essence.

nodes.name: Moonweave Crafting
nodes.description: Harvest moonlight into threads of ethereal beauty.

nodes.name: Starweave Mastery
nodes.description: Weave starlight into armor that protects against cosmic threats.

nodes.name: Voidweave Secrets
nodes.description: Master the forbidden art of weaving void energy into fabric.

nodes.name: Divine Vestments
nodes.description: Create vestments worn by gods and cosmic entities.

nodes.name: Enchanted Fabrics
nodes.description: Apply enchantments directly during cloth crafting.

nodes.name: Gemstone Staves
nodes.description: Integrate gem sockets directly into staff designs.

nodes.name: Spell-Woven Cloth
nodes.description: Weave spell formulas directly into cloth armor.

nodes.name: Fire Management
nodes.description: Master the art of controlling cooking flames. The foundation of all culinary arts.

nodes.name: Ingredient Slicing
nodes.description: Precise knife work for consistent ingredient preparation.

nodes.name: Salt Refining
nodes.description: Purify and enhance salt for better preservation and flavor.

nodes.name: Broth Base
nodes.description: Create rich, flavorful broth bases for soups and stews.

nodes.name: Cleaver Mastery I
nodes.description: Expert cleaver techniques for processing large cuts of meat.

nodes.name: Slow Smoking
nodes.description: Master the art of slow-smoking meats for deep flavor penetration.

nodes.name: Prime Rib Spec
nodes.description: Specialize in preparing premium rib cuts for maximum tenderness.

nodes.name: Wild Game Prep
nodes.description: Techniques for preparing exotic wild game meats.

nodes.name: Orcish Barbecue
nodes.description: Learn brutal but effective Orcish grilling techniques.

nodes.name: Cleaver of Feast
nodes.description: Craft the legendary Cleaver of Feast, a weapon and tool in one.

nodes.name: Dragon Steak
nodes.description: The ultimate meat dish - seared dragon flank with liquid fire.

nodes.name: Goliath Roast
nodes.description: Prepare massive roasts capable of feeding entire armies.

nodes.name: Basic Dough
nodes.description: Master the fundamentals of dough preparation.

nodes.name: Hardtack (Preserve)
nodes.description: Create long-lasting hardtack for extended journeys.

nodes.name: Sugar Work
nodes.description: Artistry with sugar for decorative and delicious confections.

nodes.name: Battle Rations
nodes.description: Compact, high-energy rations for warriors in combat.

nodes.name: Honey Glazing
nodes.description: Perfect honey glazes for enhanced flavor and preservation.

nodes.name: Pastry Mastery
nodes.description: Advanced pastry techniques for flaky, delicate creations.

nodes.name: The Eternal Cake
nodes.description: A mythical cake that never spoils and grants divine buffs.

nodes.name: Spice Extraction
nodes.description: Extract potent essences from herbs and spices.

nodes.name: Fire Chilli Infusion
nodes.description: Infuse dishes with magical fire chilli for burn damage buffs.

nodes.name: Cold-Press Oils
nodes.description: Create pure oils that preserve magical properties.

nodes.name: Poison Resistance
nodes.description: Cook dishes that grant temporary poison immunity.

nodes.name: Liquid Essence
nodes.description: Distill ingredients into their pure liquid essence form.

nodes.name: Grog Brewing
nodes.description: Brew powerful grog that enhances strength and courage.

nodes.name: Static Shock Herb
nodes.description: Cultivate herbs infused with lightning energy.

nodes.name: Astral Seasoning
nodes.description: Season dishes with extracts from astral plane ingredients.

nodes.name: Nectar of Gods
nodes.description: The legendary ambrosia - grants temporary divine powers.

nodes.name: Tinkering Basics
nodes.description: The fundamentals of mechanical engineering. Every great invention starts here.

nodes.name: Copper Wiring
nodes.description: Master electrical connections for powering devices.

nodes.name: Gear Grinding
nodes.description: Precision gear crafting for mechanical weapons.

nodes.name: Soldering I
nodes.description: Join metal components with molten solder for durable constructs.

nodes.name: Gunpowder Alchemy
nodes.description: Mix volatile compounds to create explosive propellants.

nodes.name: Crossbow Tuning
nodes.description: Fine-tune crossbow mechanisms for maximum power and accuracy.

nodes.name: Explosive Shells
nodes.description: Craft ammunition that detonates on impact.

nodes.name: Precision Sights
nodes.description: Craft optical sights for enhanced accuracy at range.

nodes.name: Hidden Traps
nodes.description: Design concealed mechanical traps for ambushes.

nodes.name: Mortar Battery
nodes.description: Construct multi-barrel mortar systems for area bombardment.

nodes.name: Nuke-In-A-Box
nodes.description: The ultimate portable explosive device. Handle with extreme caution.

nodes.name: Railgun Tech
nodes.description: Electromagnetic projectile acceleration for devastating firepower.

nodes.name: Clockwork Heart
nodes.description: Create beating mechanical hearts to power automatons.

nodes.name: Simple Drones
nodes.description: Build basic autonomous flying machines for reconnaissance.

nodes.name: Mecha-Skeleton
nodes.description: Construct the internal framework for wearable mechanical suits.

nodes.name: A.I. Neural Net
nodes.description: Program basic artificial intelligence for autonomous operation.

nodes.name: Power Cell Tech
nodes.description: Develop high-capacity power cells for extended operation.

nodes.name: Mecha Mk.I Suit
nodes.description: The first pilotable mechanical battle suit. A marvel of engineering.

nodes.name: Giga-Mech Lord
nodes.description: The ultimate mechanical titan. A walking fortress of destruction.

nodes.name: Steel Framework
nodes.description: Build reinforced steel frames for large-scale constructions.

nodes.name: Catapult Rigging
nodes.description: Design tension-based launching mechanisms for siege weapons.

nodes.name: Advanced Hydraulics
nodes.description: Master fluid-powered systems for heavy machinery.

nodes.name: Ballista Array
nodes.description: Deploy multiple synchronized ballistae for rapid fire.

nodes.name: Steam Engines
nodes.description: Harness steam power for mobile siege platforms.

nodes.name: Airship Skeleton
nodes.description: Construct the lightweight framework for flying vessels.

nodes.name: Torsion Springs
nodes.description: Create powerful torsion mechanisms for siege artillery.

nodes.name: Aeronautics II
nodes.description: Advanced flight mechanics and navigation systems.

nodes.name: The Dreadnaught
nodes.description: The ultimate flying fortress. Armed to the teeth and nearly indestructible.
